title: XPeng Inc Analyst Ratings, Estimates and Forecasts
text: XPeng Inc. (XPEV) is covered by multiple analysts with varying price targets and ratings. The consensus rating distribution shows strong buy sentiment with 78.57% BUY, 14.29% HOLD and 7.14% SELL ratings. The average price target across analysts is $24.19 USD with estimates ranging from $16.16 USD to $35.7 USD. Recent Street research has leaned cautious, with several bearish analysts trimming price targets and cutting ratings. XPeng projects to move from a loss in 2026 to profitability in 2027, with expected earnings of CN¥5.27b. The company's revenue growth rate of 21% projected for the next 3 years compares to historical 6-year CAGR of 79%, reflecting a deceleration in growth expectations. Analysts debate whether XPeng can achieve profitability while maintaining competitive market position and dealing with China's electric vehicle price pressures.
